videos.title: What I Broke on the Rubicon
videos.description:
Recon One just came home from the Rubicon and not everything survived the trip.
It's been 11 months since I brought this 2021 Wrangler Willys home for this build series, and last week it faced its biggest test yet. In this update, we go over the damage: a shredded fender liner, a fender and light that lost an argument with a tree, and a bent steering stabilizer I didn't discover until I was white knuckling it down the freeway. We'll also cover the upgrades that went on right before the trip, the

videos.description:
